programme.title: No Other Way - EP 12 / 至死不渝
programme.desc: Jialin introduces Sean to handle Hongtao’s investments, but Hongtao secretly investigates him. Keying is upset after learning Jingyun did betray her marriage. Manning feels that Shuheng is not the one for her but tries to change him. Zhipeng turns himself in for killing his wife out of exhaustion. Manning proposes to Shuheng and he accepts, leaving Keying upset.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 76 / 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 20 / 麻雀乐团
programme.desc: Zhang Tie falls ill and stays home to rest when Ouyang Zong suddenly visits her. Ouyang Zong offers her an attractive position as CEO of De Wang Group in an attempt to recruit her, and Situ Jiu rushes home after learning about it.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 268
programme.desc: Enjoy the smooth taste of Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder, made with easy-to-digest goat milk proteins and enriched with lutein, collagen, and Omega-3. It supports eye, joint, and heart health, boosts calcium intake, and strengthens immunity. Perfect for the whole family, especially seniors, to maintain bone health and vitality with just two cups a day.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 305
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Piranha 3DD
programme.desc: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Stuck in the middle of the conflict between Dementus and Immortan Joe, Furiosa fights to escape from their clutches and return to her safe haven, the Green Place.

programme.title: The Nun II
programme.desc: In 1956 France, Sister Irene faces the terrifying demon Valak, racing against time to save a convent and the surrounding community from evil.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Barry Seal is a US pilot who smuggles drugs for the CIA in the 1980s. Later, his secret work gets revealed as part of the Iran-Contra scandal.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: The Decepticons are trying to learn the secrets of a stranded Cybertronian spacecraft. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must stop them before it is too late.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: King Kong is transported out of his containment zone after Godzilla resurfaces and creates mayhem. Humans need his help to reach Hollow Earth and find a way to subdue the king of the monsters.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur is born with the ability to communicate with marine creatures. He goes on a quest to retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and protect the water world.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After losing his job at the Anti-Villain League, Gru meets his estranged twin brother. Soon, the brothers find themselves locking horns with a child artist-turned-villain.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
programme.desc: The Bride, who's now pregnant, sets off to kill her ex-boss and lover Bill, his brother, Budd the bouncer, and one-eyed Elle.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: A young boxer wins his debut championship and goes on to reach new heights of fame through his refusal to fight in Vietnam and other controversial actions.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: A geriatric gangster's release from prison leads to a reunion with his two partners in crime, one of whom has orders to kill him.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: Julie Powell, a young blogger, is determined to emulate Julia Child's cooking techniques. Though separated by time, the two women share a common passion for food that intertwines their lives.

programme.title: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: Louis Bloom, a petty thief, realises that he can make money by capturing photographs of crime scenes and starts resorting to extreme tactics to get them.

programme.title: Boychoir
programme.desc: A demanding choir master at an elite East Coast boarding school pushes a gifted but troubled orphan to fulfil his true potential.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A man wrongly accused of killing his wife races to find the real killer while a determined U.S. Marshal attempts to nab him.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: Howard Hughes, a germaphobic inventor with mental illness, creates a new plane. Despite personal struggles, he also becomes a successful filmmaker, balancing aviation and Hollywood pursuits.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Jack and Rusty play Army at school; the girls set up a fancy restaurant for Mum and Dad; Bluey, Bingo and Muffin strike a deal with the dads.

programme.title: SuperKitties
programme.desc: Stopping Cat Burglar from swiping all the cat trees from the cats of Kittydale; Mr. Puppypaws tries to make the Singing Squirrels give him a private concert.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Judo wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo; during a cricket game, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out; Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat; Dad agrees to buy ice cream; Dad tells a real-life fairy tale.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Honey's trip to Dr. Bingo keeps getting interrupted; Mum and Dad create their own Magic Claw machine; Bluey takes her tooth fairy money to the market.

programme.desc: Lucia uses magic to shrink Ariel and her friends for tiny fun; when Ariel, Akiko and Axyl visit the Crystal World, they search for a green crystal to power the new Sea Mobile.

programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises; Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic; Bluey teaches Bingo to be more like him.

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 41-42
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 18
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 18
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. programme.desc: This gender-bending tale depicts the romance between a wealthy girl and a man disguised as a flunkey in order to be employed at her house.

programme.title: The Heroic Ones

programme.title: Reincarnated Swordsman

programme.title: Double Bliss
programme.desc: Two ingenious lovebirds come up with what they think is a fool proof plan to get their parents to allow them to wed. Starring Ching Li.

programme.title: Kid From Kwangtung

programme.title: Fast Fingers

programme.title: The Grand Substitution

programme.title: The Winged Tiger
programme.desc: When villains 'Winged Tiger' Teng Fei and 'Underworld King' Yin Te Lung unite, the martial arts world is plunged into chaos. Can this deadly duo be stopped?

programme.title: Enchanting Shadow
programme.desc: This seminal film adaptation of a 17th century Pu Songling work is the precursor of the famed 'A Chinese Ghost Story'.

programme.title: The Web of Death
programme.desc: A traitorous clansman bids to locate and then unleash the deadly 'Five Venom Spider' against those who bid to stand in his way.

programme.title: Mr. Funnybone Strikes Again
programme.desc: A clash of cultures and such ensue after Mr. Funny Bone and Big Potato open an old-fashioned healing clinic in ultra-modern Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Flying Guillotine
programme.desc: A hero (Chen Kuan Tai) battles assassins who use a deadly, beheading weapon to kill dissidents.

programme.title: The Purple Shell
programme.desc: Adapted from Chiung Yao's novel, this romance depicts how a wealthy man and a sweet girl discover that they are soulmates too late in life.

programme.title: Super Inframan
programme.desc: A superhero (Danny Lee) must save the earth from legions of demons and monsters led by a blonde-haired Demon Princess.

programme.title: Les Belles
programme.desc: Lauded as one of the greatest Hong Kong musicals of the 60s, this award-winning piece starring Linda Lin Dai as a dancer who finds romance with her boss's son.

programme.title: The Silent Swordsman
programme.desc: The great martial clans of China seek to meet with the new Sun and Moon Sect leader and hatch a plan to resist invaders from the west.

programme.title: The House of 72 Tenants
programme.desc: This fascinating, humorous box office smash captures a cross-section of Hong Kong society and their issues -- all crammed into a single tenement building.

programme.title: Return of the Sentimental Swordsman
programme.desc: Ti Lung returns as Li Chin Huan, the renowned swordsman who must face the Chief of the Money Clan and his legion of assassins for the fate of the 'Martial Arts World'.

programme.title: Illicit Desire

programme.title: Family Light Affair

programme.desc: This Inoue Umetsugu musical depicts the struggle of two singing sisters, Ching Ping and Pai Hung.

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep10

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep11

programme.title: Didi & Friends Dream Jobs Ep02

programme.title: Cam & Leon S1 Ep33
programme.desc: Kisah dua ekor sesumpah urban, Cam & Leon yang lincah dan penuh dengan sifat ingin tahu. Mereka tinggal di sebuah taman rekreasi, jauh dari habitat mereka. Akibatnya banyak perkara lucu yang terjadi.

programme.title: The Eggies Ep01
programme.desc: In an eggnormal world lives 3 little egg-like animal friends who are all about discovering life and their relationships between them through fun, music and adventure.

programme.title: Mael Lambong
programme.desc: Mael Lambong merupakan seorang penarik kereta terkenal di Kuala Lumpur. Kehidupannya mula menjadi huru-hara setelah berjumpa dengan Maria yang meminta bantuannya untuk mengelak dari penjahat yang mengejarnya.

programme.title: Suamiku Encik Perfect 10
programme.desc: Kisah Aleeya Azmeen yang terpaksa berlakon sebagai pasangan suami isteri dengan Zarief Daniel selepas mengandungkan anak teman lelakinya di London. Lakonan Aaron Aziz, Lisa Surihani, Normah Damanhuri, Syazwan Zulkifli, Raja Ilya, Jasmine Hamid dan Jehan Miskin.

programme.title: The Making of Polong
programme.desc: Maria Hadi bertaubat dari ilmu hitam sebelum mati. Tersilap mewariskan polong, makhluk itu membalas dendam dan menyumpah pewarisnya

programme.title: Citra Exclusive: Mat So'od
programme.desc: Mat So'od merupakan penglipurlara di kampungnya. Namun berlawanan dengan kerjayanya, Mat So'od merupakan seorang pemurung hampir sepanjang hidupnya.

programme.title: Hanya Kawan
programme.desc: Kisah dua orang sahabat yang mula merasai kewujudan cinta di antara mereka namun merasa malu dan keliru untuk mengungkapkannya. Dibintangi oleh Ratu Rock Ella Aminuddin dan Hans Isaac.

programme.title: Cicakman 2 : Planet Hitam
programme.desc: Professor Klon kembali menyerang Cicakman dan mengancam keamanan Metrofulus bersama Rrama. Dibintangi oleh Saiful Apek, Yusry Abdul Halim, Fasha Sandha, Tamara Bleszynski, Adlin Aman Ramli dan AC Mizal.

programme.title: Cinta Kita
programme.desc: Akibat dikecewakan lelaki, Tipah merubah ketrampilan menjadi Dino, tomboy yang kecelaruan identiti sehinggalah Man muncul menyelamatkan cintanya.

programme.title: 6 Hari
programme.desc: Suzi merupakan isteri ketiga dan dia tinggal bersendirian di banglonya kerana suaminya hanya pulang selang enam hari. Semuanya indah sehinggalah pada suatu hari dia didatangi seseorang dari masa silamnya.

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih Ep03
programme.desc: Adelia risks her career to win back her daughter's heart, while Adeef faces countless obstacles just to reach Hana.

programme.title: Bukan Cerita Cinta Cliche
programme.desc: Seorang penulis skrip kisah-kisah cinta tetapi masih bersendirian mengimpikan cinta dalam kehidupan realitinya, lalu dia menyertai sebuah kumpulan terapi untuk berkongsi masalah peribadinya.

programme.title: A Hundred Billion Key
programme.desc: Kehidupan biasa dan sederhana Thach, Mai dan Dung terjalin tanpa disangka-sangka dalam kisah lucu dan pelik tentang peluang dan permulaan baru.

programme.title: Tuah
programme.desc: Hang Tuah yang telah hilang kerana mengembara ke masa hadapan pulang semula ke zaman asalnya untuk menyekat tindakan Hang Jebat dari menderhaka dan membunuh Sultan Melaka.

programme.title: Main-Main Hantu
programme.desc: Sekumpulan pemain bola jaring dan guru terkandas dalam perjalanan ke Melaka akibat bas rosak. Mereka menumpang sebuah rumah usang dan kejadian misteri mula berlaku.

programme.title: Jalan Kembali: Bohsia 2
programme.desc: Amy yang telah berubah bertekad untuk membantu gadis-gadis yang senasib dengannya. Malangnya Acai pula yang menjadi penghalangnya. Berjayakah usahanya itu?

programme.title: Tolong Saya Encik Dinosaur

Following an earthquake, the 118 races to the scene of several unusual fires and must figure out their cause before anyone else is hurt.
